sections.content: Technology has made everyone a writer. So the flipside is, people judge you by your written messages. Well articulated and impactful messages help to frame an impeccable impression about the individual, as well as the company. Business Writing is an intensive one day program helping participants improve their writing skills and communicate effectively with all the stakeholders. With lot of written practice, the participants will transform their style of writing to garner maximum impact.

content: Begin with the end in mind by understanding the purpose of writing and actionable required from the recipient
Address the audience needs by communicating concisely and specifically
Formulate the content with proper tone
Learn different style of emails, reports and presentations
Learn to write in an impactful way to get the desired outcomes
